volatility: OperationsWorkflow volatility — the sequence by which a delivered system is taken live, observed, scaled, paused, and withdrawn over its operational life; health-driven intervention, autoscaler-driven republish, idle-pause, delinquency enforcement, withdrawal, and op-time cost projection

outbound.name: interventionEngine
outbound.how: direct, by value — deterministic in-workflow call (no Activity wrapper); DecideOnHealth(healthChange) → {Retry|Escalate}

outbound.name: autoscalerEngine
outbound.how: direct, by value — deterministic in-workflow call; ProposeDesiredState(telemetry, currentDesired, policy, infrastructureKind) → {NoChange|ScaleUp|ScaleDown|Pause|Resume}

outbound.name: operationEstimationEngine
outbound.how: direct, by value — deterministic in-workflow call; ProjectForOperatedApp(observedUsage, infrastructureKind, scaleWhatIfPoints) → {currentRunRate, projectedMonthlyCost, scaleWhatIfCurve}

outbound.name: operatedSystemStateAccess
outbound.how: Activity-wrapped · version+idempotencyKey — readOperatedSystem / readInFlightOperatedApps / publishDesiredState / recordRuntimeStatusChange / withdrawSystem / recordDelinquencyAction

outbound.name: operatedRuntimeAccess
outbound.how: Activity-wrapped · version+idempotencyKey — publishDesiredState / withdraw / getApplicationHealth / getSloStatus / readComputeAttribution

outbound.name: durableExecutionAccess
outbound.how: direct — in-workflow primitives (awaitSignal, startTimer) + startup wiring (registerSchedule); category A — NOT Activities, NOT public ops

ops.note: Operator-triggered deploy/scale/policy republish: reads head-state → retrieves deployable bundle → publishDesiredState (git commit) → records head-state transition; absorbs scaleSystem and updateAutoscalerPolicy (same facet, differ by patch shape in desiredStateChange.Patch); idempotent on workflow id

fields.name: OperatedAppId
fields.note: uuid.UUID — the operated-system aggregate identifier

fields.name: DesiredStateChange
fields.note: Reason (deployAfterConstruction|operator) + Patch (FullBundle|ScalePatch|PolicyPatch)

fields.name: Published
fields.note: true iff desired state durably published to the manifests repo

fields.name: Revision
fields.note: The published desired-state revision for UI correlation; opaque

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | FailedPrecondition | NotFound | Unauthorized | Infrastructure

ops.stereotype: Workflow (entry) · Schedule-triggered (operatedStateReconcile, every 30s) · workflow id operatedStateReconcile:{tickId}
ops.note: Per-tick Path B (observe health/SLO/compute; record transitions; interventionEngine.DecideOnHealth) + Path C (autoscalerEngine.ProposeDesiredState; republish on non-NoChange); does not drive convergence; fired by schedulerClient

fields.name: Scope
fields.note: Optional; nil/empty → all in-flight operated apps

fields.name: Observed
fields.note: Count of in-flight apps observed this tick

fields.name: Transitions
fields.note: Count of head-state transitions recorded (Path B)

fields.name: Republished
fields.note: Count of autoscaler-driven republishes (Path C, non-NoChange)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error

ops.note: Withdraws desired state from manifests repo (ArgoCD prunes); records final compute usage; marks head-state withdrawn; idempotent (already-withdrawn = no-op success)

fields.name: Reason
fields.note: Struct with Notes string (operator free-text rationale)

fields.name: Withdrawn
fields.note: true iff withdrawal durably recorded; idempotent no-op success if already withdrawn

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error

ops.stereotype: Workflow (entry) · short-lived read-only · StartWorkflow · workflow id {operatedAppId}:costProjection:{requestId}
ops.note: Reads observed usage (usageAccess.readRange) + recent desired-state history → operationEstimationEngine.ProjectForOperatedApp direct in-workflow; mutates no state; sync side-effect-free

fields.name: ScaleWhatIfPoints
fields.note: Optional; nil/empty → what-if curve contains only current-load point

fields.name: CurrentRunRate
fields.note: Canonical in operationEstimationEngine.md §3

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error

ops.stereotype: Signal · queued · cross-Manager (settlementManager delivers via durableExecutionAccess.deliverSignalToManager; Manager's awaitSignal resumes)
ops.note: Reads delinquent customer's in-flight apps; per BillingTerms publishes pause-or-withdraw patch (replicas=0 or removed) via operatedRuntimeAccess; records delinquency action; queued/async

fields.name: CustomerId
fields.note: uuid.UUID — billing-customer aggregate identifier

fields.name: DelinquencyContext
fields.note: Carries BillingTerms; Manager executes the enforcement directive, does not decide it

fields.name: (void)
fields.note: Signal is queued/async; returns once durably enqueued

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error

dataContracts: OperatedAppId = uuid.UUID // operated-system aggregate identifier; standardised from DSL's mixed deployedAppId/operatedAppId
CustomerId = uuid.UUID // billing-customer aggregate identifier; canonical in settlementStateAccess
DesiredStateChange = struct{ Reason DesiredStateReason; Patch DesiredStatePatch } // Reason ∈ {deployAfterConstruction, operator} for 2.1; autoscale/delinquency reserved for 2.2/2.5
DesiredStateReason = int // ReasonDeployAfterConstruction | ReasonOperator | ReasonAutoscale (internal) | ReasonDelinquency (internal)
DelinquencyContext = struct{ Terms BillingTerms } // BillingTerms canonical in settlementStateAccess/settlementEngine; Manager executes, does not decide
ReconcileScope = struct{ AppIds []OperatedAppId } // empty ⇒ all in-flight
DeployResult = struct{ Published bool; Revision DesiredRevision }
ReconcileResult = struct{ Observed int; Transitions int; Republished int }
CostProjection // canonical in operationEstimationEngine.md §3; returned by queryCostProjection
errorModel: framework-go/manager.Error — ContractMisuse (deployAfterConstruction with Reason ∈ {autoscale, delinquency}), FailedPrecondition (deploy with no deployableBundleRef), NotFound (op against non-existent operated app), Unauthorized (from security Utility), Infrastructure (durable-execution/GitOps unavailable). Health/scale/autoscaler NoChange/convergence lag/delinquency enforcement are normal workflow outcomes, not façade errors.
idempotency: Workflows: idempotent on workflow id (StartWorkflow with same id = return existing result). operatedSystemStateAccess writes: Conflict re-read-and-reapply discipline (same idempotencyKey = ${workflowId}:${activityId}, re-derive and re-apply on stale expectedVersion). operatedRuntimeAccess writes: git-content-idempotent. usageAccess: dedup-id-idempotent (append-only ledger). applyDelinquencyPolicy Signal: signal-with-start re-derivation makes late/duplicate delivery idempotent.

revisions.summary: Initial contract: 5 ops (deployAfterConstruction, reconcileOperatedState, withdrawSystem, queryCostProjection, applyDelinquencyPolicy); scaleSystem + updateAutoscalerPolicy folded into deployAfterConstruction (same facet, differ by patch shape); Path B + Path C in one reconcile tick; 5-op sweet spot; task queue operations; operatedStateReconcile Schedule 30s

APPROVED — FROZEN. App C §6 = 9/9 PASS. OQ-2 queryCostProjection as short-lived Workflow confirmed (not a Query; Activity-wrapped RA reads + Engine call; uniform execution surface). OQ-3 OperatedAppId spelling confirmed; FU-MOP-2 DSL cleanup filed. OQ-5 reason discriminator guard confirmed sufficient. OQ-1 settlement usage-read inconsistency re-affirmed and escalated (FU-MOP-3). DSL line-436 static edge convention note flagged to architect (non-blocking). C-MOP-1..5 construction follow-ups routed.
